items.title: [Steam新闻] 🎧 V2.5.1 Radio Drama - Messenger
items.summary: "Beautiful moments never last. Every story has to come to an end.""The mere thought of it makes my heart flutter. If you find me one day... I will be so, so happy..."✦ Saya VA: Midori Kawamura
items.author: lqx02483534

items.title: [Steam新闻] V2.5.1.0 Maintenance Announcement
items.summary: Dear Keeper,Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 12:00 on June 1(UTC+8).You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation! \Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver×200, Ethereal Core×5 \The collection period ends on June 1, 2026 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.\...
items.author: lqx02483534

items.title: [Steam新闻] ✨ Morimens × Saya no Uta 2.5th Anniversary Collaboration
items.summary: A wandering seed, crossing the boundaries between worlds, taking root and blooming across the barren earth... multiplying."This is... where a new world begins."Log in and complete select stages to claim all of the following rewards:✦ Rare Limited Gacha Item "Ethereal Core" ×250✦ SSR Limited Awakener "Saya"🎁 More anniversary gifts await. Stay tuned!
